calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court required a hearing in this matter for Defendant to bring evidence tracing the source of the funds in his Bank of America account to his wages. There being no appearance by either party, the Court issued the following ruling: DEFENDANT ERIC SAINZ' Claim Of Exemption is denied. The Court shall prepare and serve the order on all parties. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
